subtitle: Receipt-backed patterns. Diagnosis sells now; autonomy tiers stay proof-gated until SourceA runs 24/7 with receipts.

ladder.name: Brain Audit
ladder.note: Diagnosis only. Zero proof of our own result required.

ladder.name: Operating Brain Install / Brain v0
ladder.note: Bounded build. Anchor = one pattern proven on SourceA (zero-drift). No autonomy promise.

ladder.name: Managed Deterministic Brain
ladder.note: LOCKED. Unlocks only after SourceA runs 24/7 with receipts.

ladder.name: VIP Brain Architecture
ladder.note: LOCKED. Reserved for later, after the managed tier is proven.

price_disclaimer: All price bands are SYNTHETIC indicative pilot ranges drawn from the P10 product docs, shown for storefront layout only. They are not quotes and not a guaranteed claim. Fixed name / fixed price / fixed scope is set per engagement.

patterns.name: Signal Factory
patterns.what: Triage a raw inbound signal into a fixed decision report: classification, implied need, four 0-5 scores, one bounded next action, a machine-checkable JSON receipt.
patterns.buyer_pain: Inbound noise (pitches, cold email, form submits) with no consistent, auditable way to decide what to do with each one.
patterns.commercial: Inbound-triage automation recipe, delivered as a SourceA skill the client runs on their own stack.
patterns.price_note: Architect-locked spec; worker-build pending. Pricing not yet populated for this pattern.
patterns.proof: risk >= 4 routes to human/legal review (no autonomous action); sender claims stay assertions, never laundered as facts.

patterns.name: Brain Audit
patterns.what: Diagnose stack fragmentation, definition drift, agent theater, missing receipts, dead workflows, founder overload, and a missing decision-spine. Deliver a Brain Coherence Report plus a first executable roadmap.
patterns.buyer_pain: Ten competent fragments (agents, prompts, docs) that do not share a spine; the puzzle stays incomplete even when every piece exists.
patterns.tier_label: Tier 1 - Brain Audit (sells now, diagnosis only)
patterns.commercial: Diagnostic engagement. We diagnose the client's chaos; no claim is made about our own result.
patterns.price_source: sibling diagnostic bands: agentic-cost-governance-service.md Tier 1 ($2K-$5K) + operational-language-governance-audit.md Tier 1 ($4K-$8K)
patterns.proof: Needs zero SourceA proof: the deliverable is a report + roadmap; nothing about our own result is claimed.

patterns.name: Zero-Drift Target
patterns.what: Hold the client's locked vocabulary, framing, and strategy and execute it identically over time: same input to same decision object, across runs and model swaps, with semantic-firewall violations blocked.
patterns.buyer_pain: Our AI drifts our definitions and gives different answers to the same thing; it cannot be trusted to stay on-spec.
patterns.commercial: The credibility-anchor proof module inside an Operating Brain Install: locked-definitions to decision-core to soup-wall.
patterns.price_source: brain-as-a-service.md Tier 2 (Operating Brain Install / Brain v0), bounded build
patterns.proof: Receipts: same input to same decision object across runs and model swaps; semantic-firewall violations blocked; content-identity held.

patterns.name: Anti-Theater
patterns.what: The system cannot fake success. Flaws are blind-detected and heals are independently verified; no self-certification. Blind-detected flaw to independent FAIL/PASS to live-unchanged-on-FAIL, logged.
patterns.buyer_pain: Agents report green while things break (grade-its-own-homework).
patterns.commercial: The verifier/receipt substrate designed into an Operating Brain Install so the client's system proves its own work.
patterns.price_source: brain-as-a-service.md Tier 2 substrate (verifier/receipt loop), bounded build
patterns.proof: The provability is the product: a blind-detected issue independently caught, on signed receipts (malformed bundle to FAIL to gate-refused to live-unchanged).

patterns.name: Operational Language Governance
patterns.what: Map where agents, forms, decisions, and docs disagree about words. Deliver a machine-readable classification index, a gated dry scan, a safe rewrite plan, and an escalation queue. Diagnosis first; no unsupervised bulk rewrite.
patterns.buyer_pain: Terminology drift and undefined system words: the linter flags everything, CI noise blocks merges, and a clean pass quietly creates new warnings.
patterns.tier_label: Tier 1 - Language & Decision Cleanup Audit (sells now)
patterns.commercial: Read-only audit of the client's language debt with a safe fix order and a receipt; managed weekly loop is a separate, later tier.
patterns.price_source: operational-language-governance-audit.md Tier 1 (1-2 week diagnostic pilot band)
patterns.proof: Proven on the SG library (158 files, 0 WARN at RC3) and a 127-term SourceA overlay. Client results depend on corpus quality and escalation throughput.

patterns.name: Auto-Heal Hospital
patterns.what: Continuous, bounded self-repair: detect, diagnose adversarially, fix content/plan/config (never the substrate), verify, re-probe. A fix that does not move a real metric auto-reverts.
patterns.buyer_pain: Our system degrades silently and someone has to babysit it.
patterns.commercial: Managed, receipt-backed self-repair loop running on the client's stack.
patterns.gate_reason: Managed autonomy tier. Unlocks only after SourceA runs 24/7 with receipts. Rendered LOCKED, never sold as a running result.
patterns.price_note: Price gated with the tier: no figure is offered until the proof condition is met.
patterns.proof: Heal only counts if it moves a real signal (auto-revert otherwise); self-heal may never touch the immutable floor; improvement is measured, not declared.

patterns.name: Alive-Doc & Stale-Pointer Governance
patterns.what: Separate alive (ACTIVE) from index (READ_SURFACE) from dead (RETIRED). Detect stale patterns, retired motors, and missing paths across ACTIVE authority roots; write a repair queue with a receipt on a weekly autorun.
patterns.buyer_pain: Stale ACTIVE pointers downgrade the whole stack to last week's mistakes: agents repair retired motors and read the wrong runtime truth.
patterns.commercial: Managed weekly staleness scan with a repair queue and receipt. A one-shot diagnostic sells at Tier 1; the managed loop is the locked tier.
patterns.gate_reason: Managed weekly autorun. Unlocks only after SourceA runs 24/7 with receipts. Rendered LOCKED, never sold as a running result.
patterns.price_note: Price gated with the tier: no figure is offered until the proof condition is met.
patterns.proof: Seven finding classes (missing_read_surface, stale_law_pattern, retired_workflow_motor, library_registry_drift, superseded_still_active, ...). Machines inspect authority only; never bulk-edit ledgers or form exports.
